name: 炽焰之心
setDescription4pc: 施放必杀技后，暴击率提升16%，持续12秒
setDescription4pcEn: After using Ultimate, CRIT Rate +16% for 12s

name: 永恒守护
setDescription4pc: 为队伍中所有角色提供15%伤害减免，持续10秒（每30秒触发一次）
setDescription4pcEn: Reduces DMG taken by 15% for all party members for 10s (every 30s)

name: 狂战士之怒
setDescription4pc: 暴击率低于50%时，暴击率额外提升15%；暴击率达到50%以上时，暴击伤害额外提升20%
setDescription4pcEn: When CRIT Rate is below 50%, gain +15% CRIT Rate; when CRIT Rate is 50%+, gain +20% CRIT DMG

name: 裂空之牙
setDescription4pc: 触发属性反应时，对应属性伤害额外提升18%，持续10秒
setDescription4pcEn: Upon triggering elemental reaction, corresponding elemental DMG +18% for 10s

name: 坚岩之心
setDescription4pc: 受到攻击时生成护盾，吸收量相当于防御力的40%，持续8秒（每15秒触发一次）
setDescription4pcEn: When hit, generates a shield absorbing 40% of DEF for 8s (every 15s)

name: 繁星之誓
setDescription4pc: 施放治疗技能时，额外恢复目标最大生命值的8%；治疗溢出时转化为护盾
setDescription4pcEn: When casting healing skills, additionally restore 8% of target's Max HP; excess healing converts to a shield

name: 万象归一
setDescription4pc: 队伍中每有一种不同属性的角色，自身伤害提升6%，最高18%
setDescription4pcEn: For each different attribute in the party, DMG +6% (max 18%)

name: 暗影突袭
setDescription4pc: 从背后攻击时，暴击伤害额外提升30%

name: 回响之潮
setDescription4pc: 施放必杀技后，全队能量回复15点
setDescription4pcEn: After using Ultimate, all party members recover 15 Energy
